title: attendance — compliance evidence
description: Attendance is safeguarding-adjacent (minor check-ins with device fingerprint + GPS), money-adjacent (Pass consumption + no-show fees), and audit-critical (state-machine + membership freeze cascade). US Department of Education retention for youth programs. State-level SafeSport minor-verification requirements. GDPR Art. 6(1)(b) contractual basis. CCPA export rights. COPPA parental consent for biometric-adjacent collection.

controls.evidence: AttendanceRecord retains 7 years post-session (10 years Enterprise). Federation regulators may inspect multi-year eligibility trails.
checked_in_by_user_id captures the User who verified the check-in for a minor athlete. coach_verified path requires the coach to be actively assigned to the session via sports/coaching module.
Attendance recording is necessary to fulfil the tenant's contract with the athlete's guardian (rendering the paid service — sessions attended).

Guardian consent for device_fingerprint + GPS capture on minor athletes validated at check-in — refuses with ATTENDANCE_MINOR_CONSENT_MISSING when consent not recorded on the athlete's consent_snapshot.

controls.principle: right to erasure — with retention exception
controls.evidence: Attendance records retain 7 years post-session for federation compliance. Records under regulator hold survive TenantErased as compliance archive rows.
Guardians can request an export of their athlete's attendance history via /athletes/{athlete}/attendance and via the tenant's data-export flow.
Device fingerprint + IP + GPS are collected for fraud correlation ONLY. Analytics events strip these fields; no third-party subprocessor receives them.

For minor athletes, guardian consent for device_fingerprint_hash + gps_lat/gps_lng capture is validated at check-in time. Kiosk check-in requires explicit consent flag on the parent Athlete's consent_snapshot; refuses with ATTENDANCE_MINOR_CONSENT_MISSING otherwise. Policy must document what fingerprint / GPS data is collected and retained.

attendance.cancel restricted to hr / branch_manager / admin / owner (coaches cannot cancel attendance to hide misconduct). absences.reverse-excuse restricted to safeguarding_officer + admin + owner (prevents cover-up of documented absences).

CleanupOrphanCheckinsJob P1 signal — every finding (orphan attendance without pass consumption, orphan pass without attendance, mutual-exclusion violation) is investigated. Metric stackra.attendance.orphan.without_pass should stay at 0.

Absence records carry status + reason + counted_toward_freeze + retention 3 years. Platform-side compliance dashboard cross-references absence patterns against protected characteristics (redacted per platform-plane rules) to detect discriminatory attendance-policy enforcement.
